
# VVIOK Industry - Industrial Filtration Solutions

VVIOK Industry is a premier manufacturer and exporter of high-performance industrial filtration products based in Ahmedabad, India. We specialize in stainless steel equipment, microfiltration components, and specialized storage solutions for global markets.

## Key Product Entities
- Filter Cartridges: PP Spun, PP Pleated, PTFE Pleated, SS Wire Mesh, SS Sintered Powder.
- Industrial Housings: Bag Filter, Cartridge Filter, Vent Filter, Duplex Filter, Multi-Bag, Multi-Cartridge.
- Industrial Strainers: Basket, Taper, Conical, Pleated.
- Industrial Vessels: Storage Tanks, Pressure Vessels, Air Receiver Tanks, Purified Water Tanks.

## Technical Expertise
- Compliance: ASME Section VIII, CE Marking, ISO 9001:2015.
- Materials: SS 304, SS 316, SS 316L, Duplex Stainless Steel.
- Industries Served: Pharmaceuticals, Chemicals, Water Treatment, Food & Beverage, Oil & Gas.
